creator: jroberts@ashland.edu
text:
Installation goes fine until I get the last screen (for adding packages).  The emacs-2 and jove-4 packages are evidently corrupted.  gzip returns "files not really there" and hangs.  I can ^C to stop the full installation, but not to just kill the failed package attempt, so I lose hours of work.

The machine is a Cyrix P6-120+ w/ 40MB RAM, two mult-GB drives, 2MB 3D ProVidia 9685.  Installing on the secondary drive, BTW.

How-To-Repeat: Well, I'm not sure how many packages will give this result.  It seemed to work for the majority of them.  You could try installing those packages.
